description: Configure the 'Dredger' vessel model to display the 'Restricted in Ability to Maneuver' (RAM) day shapes (Ball-Diamond-Ball) in a vertical line on the main mast by modifying the model definition file at '/opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ownship/Dredger/boat.ini'. The configuration must use 'ball.3ds' for the top and bottom shapes and 'diamond.3ds' for the middle shape. All shapes must be aligned horizontally at X=0.0, Y=5.0, with the top shape positioned at Z=12.0 and a minimum vertical distance of 1.5 meters between adjacent shapes.
